scripts.build: tsc && cp -R src/agents/prompts dist/agents/prompts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));fs.writeFileSync('dist/package.json', JSON.stringify({name:pkg.name,version:pkg.version,type:'module',main:'./index.js'}, null, 2)+'\n');"
